title: Five Estuaries Offshore Wind Farm: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision on behalf of the Secretary of State, by Alan Whitehead (Minister for Energy Security and Net Zero) on an application for the construction and operation of an offshore wind farm with grid connection capacity of up to 1080MW, including up to 79 turbines, off the coast of Suffolk and Essex.   Date of decision  17 December 2025    Company / location   Five Estuaries Offshore Wind Farm Limited Swindon WiltshireEngland   Type of project  Development consent order for an offshore wind farm under the Planning Act 2008.    Maximum output  1080 MW "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
